strengths: Perfect technical stack match: extensive TypeScript, Node.js, React, REST API, and database experience across multiple production systems
Strong commitment to clean architecture, TDD, and software craftsmanship—embedded in resume across multiple roles and open-source projects
Proven ability to scale systems (handled millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby) and mentor others through workshops and public speaking
concerns: Severe overqualification: Staff-level engineer with 15+ years experience applying for junior/mid-level role raises retention and compensation alignment risks
Geographic mismatch: currently based in Lagos, Nigeria with recent roles in Berlin; high on-site requirement likely incompatible with current location
No PostgreSQL explicitly mentioned despite job preference; resume lists generic SQL, MongoDB, MySQL but not PostgreSQL specifically
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates exceptional technical depth across the entire required stack and genuine commitment to clean code practices. However, this Staff-level engineer with 15+ years of professional experience is fundamentally misaligned with an entry/junior-level position, creating strong concerns about retention, compensation expectations, and whether the role would adequately challenge them. Geographic location (Lagos) and high on-site requirements also require clarification and may be incompatible.
